title: agalinis wrightii
intro: Agalinis wrightii, also known as Wright's Agalinis, is a perennial plant native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Agalinis wrightii include its potential to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to lower blood pressure and reduce inflammation. Agalinis wrightii can be prepared as a tea or tincture, and it is also used in some herbal remedies for its purported health benefits.
